mapper.select: select database_type as dataBaseType , project_name as projectName, tablename_en as tableNameEN, tablename_ch as tableNameCH, PARTITIONED as partitioned, DATA_SOURCE_ID as dataSourceId from DP_DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE where ISDELETE = '0' and ISADDMONITOR = '已控'

select t1.database_type as dataBaseType , t1.tablename_en as tableNameEN, t1.tablename_ch as tableNameCH , '0' as tableTodaySum , case when t2.tableallcount is null then 0 else t2.tableallcount end as tableAllSum , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') as statisticDay , t1.project_name as tableProject , CONCAT(UUID(), FLOOR(RAND() * 100000000)) as statisticId from DP_DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE t1 left join ( select tableproject , tablename , tableallcount from ( select row_number() over(partition by concat(tableproject, tablename) order by INSERTEDDATATIME desc) rn , tableproject , tablename , ispartition , INSERTEDDATATIME , tableallcount from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL) sta where rn = 1 ) t2 on t1.project_name || t1.tablename_en COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci = t2.tableproject || t2.tablename COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO DP_DATA_STORAGE_TABLE_FULL (TABLE_NAME_EN , TABLE_NAME_CH , TABLE_TODAY_SUM , TABLE_ALL_SUM,STATISTIC_DAY,TABLE_PROJECT,STATISTIC_ID ,DATABASE_TYPE) VALUES
(#{item.tableNameEN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableNameCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.tableTodaySum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableAllSum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.statisticDay,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{item.tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,CONCAT(UUID(), FLOOR(RAND() * 100000000)) ,#{item.dataBaseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT t4.* , CASE WHEN t5.frequency IS NULL THEN '0/0' ELSE t5.frequency END AS frequency, CASE WHEN t5.TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH = '0' THEN 'NONLIVING' WHEN t5.TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH IS NULL THEN 'NONLIVING' ELSE 'LIVING' END AS liveType, t5.TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH as tableUseCountOfmonth FROM ( SELECT t1.* , CASE WHEN t2.partitioncount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t2.partitioncount END AS yesterdayCount, -- 昨日分区数据量 CASE WHEN t3.averageSum IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t3.averageSum END AS averageDailyVolume, -- 近几天分区的平均数据量（告警设置） CASE WHEN t3.averageSize IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t3.averageSize END AS averageDailySize -- 近几天分区的平均数据大小（告警设置） FROM ( SELECT sjxjbm, --表协议名 CASE WHEN c.name IS NULL THEN tableAll.TABLECOMMENT ELSE c.name END AS name, --表中文名 CASE WHEN c.tablename IS NULL THEN upper( tableAll.tablename ) ELSE upper( c.tablename ) END AS tableNameEn, --表英文名 c.PRIMARYDATASOURCECH AS primaryDatasourceCh, -- 一级数据来源中文名 c.SECONDARYDATASOURCECH AS secondaryDatasourceCh, -- 二级数据来源中文名 c.PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH AS primaryOrganizationCh, -- 数据组织一级分类中文名 c.SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH AS secondaryOrganizationCh, -- 数据组织二级分类中文名 tableAll.TABLECREATEDTIME AS tableCreatedTime, -- 表创建时间 CASE WHEN tableAll.TABLEALLCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE tableAll.TABLEALLCOUNT END AS tableAllCount, -- 表数据总行数 到昨天分区 CASE WHEN tableAll.tablesize IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE tableAll.tablesize END AS tableSize, -- 表数据总大小 到昨天分区 byte tableAll.TABLEPROJECT AS tableProject, -- 表的项目名 CASE WHEN tableAll.ISPARTITION != 0 THEN '' WHEN tableAll.LIFECYCLE = - 1 THEN '永久' ELSE CAST( tableAll.LIFECYCLE AS CHAR ) END AS lifeCycle, -- 表的生命周期 CASE WHEN tableAll.ISPARTITION IS NULL THEN '-1' ELSE CAST( tableAll.ISPARTITION AS CHAR ) END AS partitionMessage, -- 分区标识 CASE WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, -- 表类型 odps/ads/HBASE/HIVE CASE WHEN sjxjbm IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '-1' END AS registerState -- 注册状态 FROM ( SELECT * FROM classify_interface_all_Date WHERE tablename IS NOT NULL ) c full join ( SELECT TABLEPROJECT, tablename, TABLECOMMENT, TABLEALLCOUNT, TABLETYPE, tablesize, LIFECYCLE, ISPARTITION, TABLECREATEDTIME, CASE WHEN length( PARTITIONDATE ) = 6 THEN DATE_FORMAT( STR_TO_DATE( t.INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) - 1, '%Y%m%d' ) ELSE PARTITIONDATE END AS PARTITIONDATE FROM ( SELECT TABLEPROJECT, tablename, TABLECOMMENT, TABLEALLCOUNT, TABLETYPE, tablesize, LIFECYCLE, ISPARTITION, INSERTEDDATATIME, PARTITIONDATE, TABLECREATEDTIME, ROW_NUMBER () over ( partition BY concat( TABLEPROJECT, tablename ) ORDER BY PARTITIONDATE DESC ) AS num FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE substr( PARTITIONDATE, 1, 1 ) = '2' AND ( length( PARTITIONDATE ) = 6 OR length( PARTITIONDATE ) = 8 ) ) t WHERE t.num = 1 AND STR_TO_DATE( t.INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) > NOW() - 8 ) tableAll ON upper( c.tablename ) = upper( tableAll.tablename ) ) t1 left join ( SELECT partitioncount, tablename, tableproject FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE partitiondate = DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y%m%d') ) t2 ON upper( t1.tableNameEn ) = upper( t2.tablename ) AND upper( t1.tableProject ) = upper( t2.tableproject ) left join ( SELECT tableNewName, ceil( sum( partitioncount ) / count( tableNewName )) AS averageSum, ceil( sum( partitionsize ) / count( tableNewName )) AS averageSize FROM ( SELECT tableproject || tablename AS tableNewName, partitioncount, partitionsize, PARTITIONDATE, ROW_NUMBER () over ( partition BY concat( TABLEPROJECT, tablename ) ORDER BY PARTITIONDATE DESC ) AS num FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL ) t5 WHERE t5.num <
#{setting.fluctuateDays,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
8
8
GROUP BY tableNewName ) t3 ON upper( t3.tableNewName ) = upper( t1.tableProject || t1.tableNameEn ) ) t4 left join ( SELECT DISTINCT TABLENAMEEN, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH || '/' || TABLEUSECOUNT AS frequency, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH FROM DP_STORECYCLEANDUSEHEAT ) t5 ON upper( t5.TABLENAMEEN ) = upper( t4.tableproject || '.' || t4.tableNameEn ) AND upper( t5.TABLETYPE ) = upper( t4.tableType ) WHERE tableproject IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete: delete from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where STATISTICS_TIME > date(NOW())
delete from USER_AUTHORITY where create_time > date(NOW()) and modulecode = 'ZCGL'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS (SJXJBM,NAME,TABLE_NAME_EN,PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH,SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,FACTOR_ONE_NAME,FACTOR_TWO_NAME,FACTOR_DETAILED_NAME,FACTOR_ATTRIBUTES_NAME,TABLE_ALL_COUNT, TABLE_SIZE,TABLE_PROJECT,LIFE_CYCLE,TABLE_TYPE,YESTERDAY_COUNT,PARTITION_MESSAGE,AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME,VALUE_RATE,NULL_RATE, TABLE_STATE, UPDATE_TYPE , STATISTICS_TIME ,FREQUENCY,LIVETYPE,REGISTER_STATE,OBJECT_ID,AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE,OBJECT_STATE, -- LABELS, EXCEPTION_MESSAGE,LIFE_CYCLE_STATUS,TABLECREATEDTIME,UPDATE_DATE,UPDATE_PERIOD,DATARESOURCE_CODE,LASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME, PARTITION_NUM,RESOURCEID,THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH,ORGANIZATION_ID_LAST_LEVEL,DATASOURCE_LAST_LEVEL,RES_NAME,ISSTANDARD,ALARM_LEVEL ) VALUES
(#{item.sjxjbm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.primaryDatasourceCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.secondaryDatasourceCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.primaryOrganizationCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.secondaryOrganizationCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.factorOneName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.factorTwoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.factorDetailedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.factorAttributesName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.tableAllCount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.tableSize,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.lifeCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.yesterdayCount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.partitionMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.averageDailyVolume,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.valueRate,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.nullRate,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.tableState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.updateType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NOW(), #{item.frequency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.liveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.registerState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.objectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.averageDailySize,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.objectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.exceptionMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.lifeCycleStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableCreatedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.updateDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.updatePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.belongSystemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.lastDataModifiedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.partitionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.resourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.threeLevelOrganizationCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.organizationIdLastLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.dataresourceIdLastLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.isStandard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.alarmLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select upper(SJXJBM) as sjxjbm,upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) as tableNameEn,APPROVAL_STATUS as registerState from DP_DATA_REGISTER where APPROVAL_STATUS ='2' and APPROVAL_TYPE = 'register'
select distinct OBJECTID as objectId,upper(TABLEID) as SJXJBM,upper(TABLENAME) as tableNameEn,OBJECTSTATE as objectState from SYNLTE.OBJECT where RELATE_TABLENAME = 'OBJECTFIELD'

select a.SJXJBM as sjxjbm, upper(a.TABLE_NAME_EN) as tableNameEn, upper(a.TABLE_PROJECT) as tableProject, a.TABLE_TYPE as tableType, a.STATISTICS_TIME as statisticsTime, a.OBJECT_ID as objectId, a.name, a.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryDatasourceCh, a.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as secondaryDatasourceCh, a.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryOrganizationCh, a.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as secondaryOrganizationCh, a.PARTITION_MESSAGE as partitionMessage, a.TABLE_ALL_COUNT as tableAllCount, a.TABLE_SIZE as tableSize, a.LIFE_CYCLE as lifeCycle, a.YESTERDAY_COUNT as yesterdayCount, a.AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME as averageDailyVolume, a.VALUE_RATE as valueRate, a.NULL_RATE as nullRate, a.FREQUENCY as frequency, a.AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE as averageDailySize, -- LABELS as labels, a.REGISTER_STATE as registerState, a.object_state as objectState, b.SJZZFLCODEID as organizationIdLastLevel, b.SJLYFLCODEID as dataresourceIdLastLevel from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS_TEMP a left join (SELECT DISTINCT SJXJBM,TABLENAME, case when SJYJFLCODENAME is null or SJYJFLCODENAME = '' then 'null' else 'JZCODEGASJZZFL' || SJYJFLCODENAME || SJEJFLCODENAME || SJSJFLCODENAME end as SJZZFLCODEID, case when SJLYYJCODENAME is null or SJLYYJCODENAME = '' then 'null' else 'GACODE000404' || SJLYYJCODENAME || SJLYEJCODENAME end as SJLYFLCODEID FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE) b on upper(a.table_name_en) = b.TABLENAME
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL (TABLECOMMENT, TABLEPROJECT, TABLENAME, LIFECYCLE, ISPARTITION, PARTITIONDATE, PARTITIONCOUNT, PARTITIONSIZE, TABLEALLCOUNT, TABLESIZE, INSERTEDDATATIME, TABLETYPE,DATAID) VALUES
(#{item.TABLECOMMENT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLEPROJECT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLENAME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.LIFECYCL,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ISPARTITION,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), #{item.PARTITIONCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.PARTITIONSIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLEALLCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLESIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'),'4', #{item.DATAID,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL (TABLENAME,TABLEPROJECT,TABLECOMMENT,TABLETYPE,LIFECYCLE,TABLESIZE, TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,PARTITIONDATE,PARTITIONCOUNT,ISPARTITION, TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,TABLECREATEDTIME,INSERTEDDATATIME,TABLEALLCOUNT, PARTITIONSIZE,DATAID ) values
(#{item.TABLENAME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLEPROJECT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLECOMMENT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLETYPE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.LIFECYCLE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLESIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.PARTITIONDATE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.PARTITIONCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ISPARTITION,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLECREATEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #{item.TABLEALLCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.PARTITIONSIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.DATAID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.delete: delete from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL where TABLETYPE = #{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL (TABLENAME,TABLEPROJECT,TABLECOMMENT,TABLETYPE,LIFECYCLE,TABLESIZE, TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,PARTITIONDATE,PARTITIONCOUNT,ISPARTITION, TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,TABLECREATEDTIME,INSERTEDDATATIME,TABLEALLCOUNT, PARTITIONSIZE,DATAID ) VALUES
(lower(#{item.TABLENAME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), lower(#{item.TABLEPROJECT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{item.TABLECOMMENT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 7, #{item.LIFECYCL,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLESIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.PARTITIONDATE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.PARTITIONCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ISPARTITION,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.TABLECREATEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #{item.TABLEALLCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.PARTITIONSIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.DATAID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select THRESHOLD_VALUE from DGN_COMMON_SETTING where upper(PARENT_ID) = upper('dataProperty') and IS_ACTIVE = '1' and TREE_TYPE = '3'

select SJXJBM as tableId,TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn,OBJECT_ID as objectId,APPROVAL_ID as approvalId, APPROVAL_STATUS as approvalStatus,APPROVAL_CREATE_TIME as approvalCreateTime, APPROVAL_UPDATE_TIME as approvalUpdateTime,APPROVAL_TYPE as approvalType, TABLE_PROJECT as tableProject from DP_DATA_REGISTER where APPROVAL_STATUS ='2' and APPROVAL_TYPE = #{approvalType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT upper(TABLENAME) AS tableName, upper(TABLEPROJECT) AS projectName, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'Hive-HUAWEI' WHEN TABLETYPE = 12 THEN 'Hive-CDH' WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, TABLESIZE AS totalSize, PARTITIONCOUNT AS partionCount, TABLEALLCOUNT AS totalCount, PARTITIONSIZE AS partionSize, ISPARTITION AS isPartitionTable, LIFECYCLE AS tableLife, TABLECREATEDTIME as tableCreatedTime, tableLastMetaModifiedTime as lastDataModifiedTime, partitionnum as partitionNum FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') and TABLETYPE != 7

SELECT upper(TABLENAME) AS tableName, upper(TABLEPROJECT) AS projectName, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, DATAID as resourceId, TABLESIZE AS totalSize, PARTITIONCOUNT AS partionCount, TABLEALLCOUNT AS totalCount, PARTITIONSIZE AS partionSize, ISPARTITION AS isPartitionTable, LIFECYCLE AS tableLife, TABLECREATEDTIME as tableCreatedTime, tableLastMetaModifiedTime as lastDataModifiedTime, partitionnum as partitionNum, partitiondate as partionDate, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') as insertDataTime FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE TABLETYPE = 7 and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')

SELECT UPPER(TABLENAME) AS tableName, UPPER(TABLEPROJECT) AS projectName, TABLETYPE as tableType, SUM(PARTITIONCOUNT) AS partionCount FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE TABLETYPE IN (5, 12) AND ISPARTITION = 0 GROUP BY TABLENAME, TABLEPROJECT, TABLETYPE

SELECT DISTINCT SJXJBM AS sjxjbm, CASE WHEN TABLENAME IS NULL OR TABLENAME = '' THEN 'null' ELSE UPPER(TABLENAME) END AS tableNameEn, NAME AS name, PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH AS primaryOrganizationCh, FIRSTORGANIZATIONCH AS threeLevelOrganizationCh, SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH AS secondaryOrganizationCh, PRIMARYDATASOURCECH AS primaryDatasourceCh, SECONDARYDATASOURCECH AS secondaryDatasourceCh, OBJECTID AS objectId, OBJECTSTATE AS objectState, CASE WHEN SJYJFLCODENAME IS NULL OR SJYJFLCODENAME = '' THEN 'null' ELSE CONCAT(#{sjzzflCodeId}, SJYJFLCODENAME, SJEJFLCODENAME, SJSJFLCODENAME) END AS organizationIdLastLevel, CASE WHEN SJLYYJCODENAME IS NULL OR SJLYYJCODENAME = '' THEN 'null' ELSE CONCAT('GACODE000404', SJLYYJCODENAME, SJLYEJCODENAME) END AS dataresourceIdLastLevel FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE;

SELECT t3.*, CASE WHEN t3.averageSum IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t3.averageSum END AS averageDailyVolume, -- 近几天分区的平均数据量（告警设置） CASE WHEN t3.averageSize IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t3.averageSize END AS averageDailySize -- 近几天分区的平均数据大小（告警设置） FROM (SELECT tableproject as projectName, tablename as tableName, tableType, ceil(sum(partitioncount) / count(tableproject || tablename || tableType)) AS averageSum, ceil(sum(partitionsize) / count(tableproject || tablename || tableType)) AS averageSize FROM (SELECT tableproject, tablename, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE-HUAWEI' WHEN TABLETYPE = 12 THEN 'HIVE-CDH' WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, partitioncount, partitionsize, partitiondate, row_number() over(PARTITION BY concat(TABLEPROJECT, tableproject || tablename || tableType) ORDER BY PARTITIONDATE DESC) AS num FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL) t5 WHERE t5.num < 8 GROUP BY tablename, tableproject, tableType) t3

SELECT SUBSTR(TABLENAMEEN, 1, INSTR(TABLENAMEEN, '.') - 1) AS projectName, SUBSTR(TABLENAMEEN, INSTR(TABLENAMEEN, '.') + 1) AS tableName, tableType, CASE WHEN frequency IS NULL THEN '0/0' ELSE frequency END AS frequency, CASE WHEN TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH = '0' THEN 'NONLIVING' WHEN TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH IS NULL THEN 'NONLIVING' ELSE 'LIVING' END AS liveType, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH AS tableUseCountOfmonth FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TABLENAMEEN, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, CONCAT(TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH, '/', TABLEUSECOUNT) AS frequency, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH FROM DP_STORECYCLEANDUSEHEAT ) AS sub;
mapper.delete: delete from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where date(NOW()) - #{item} > STATISTICS_TIME
mapper.select: select INSIDE_ACCEPT from DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS where data_time > date(NOW()) - #{i} and table_name_en = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select resource_id as sjxjbm, storage_acceptor as tableAllCount, DATE_FORMAT(data_time, '%Y%m%d') as updateDate from dac_bill_link_statistic where data_time > date(NOW()) - #{i}
select INSIDE_ACCEPT from DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS where data_time > date(NOW()) - #{i} and table_name_en = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select tabletype || '.' || sjxjbm as sjxjbm, tableAllCount, updateDate from (select distinct case when tabletype = '1' then 'odps' when tabletype = '2' or tabletype = '3' then 'ads' when tabletype = '4' then 'hbase' when tabletype = '5' or tabletype = '12' then 'hive' when tabletype = '7' then 'clickhouse' else '123' end as tabletype, lower(tableproject) || '.' || lower(tablename) as sjxjbm, tableallcount as tableAllCount, partitiondate as updateDate from synlte.syndmg_table_all where DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - #{i}, '%Y%m%d') and DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d') and tableallcount is not null) x

select codeid as codeId,codename as codeName,codetext as codeText, parcodeid as codeIdPar from v_classify_info t
where upper(t.codeid) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci like upper('%${classCode}%') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci

select distinct TABLENAME as tableName, SJXJBM as tableId, PROJECT_NAME as projectName, case when sjzzyjfl is null then 'null' else sjzzyjfl end as sjzzyjfl, case when sjzzejfl is null then 'null' else sjzzejfl end as sjzzejfl from synlte.public_data_info
select TABLENAME from synlte.object
select tablename as tableNameEn, project_name as tableProject, store_type as tableType from synlte.object_store_info
